text: Visa for the recognition of vocational training with simultaneous employment e.g. For nurses Artikel Conditions: For the pursuit of certain regulated professions: e.g. Nurse, surgical assistant, ...) in Germany a professional training permit is required. This must be the case with the competent German body are requested. The competent authority shall either establish that all the requirements for a professional licence are met or that further qualification measures are required first, so-called ‘deficit notice’. If a deficit notice has been issued for you, you can obtain the necessary qualifications in Germany and start working in parallel. As soon as you possess or have obtained the professional training permit, you can obtain a residence permit for employment as a specialist according to § 18a AufenthG request. Info Further information on the recognition of your foreign professional qualification and the regulation of certain professions can be found at Recognition in Germany . General information about working and living in Germany can be found at Make-it-in-Germany . If the required language skills are not available for the issue of a professional licence in regulated professions, the qualification measures may also include participation in a language course or specialist language course. Please note that even if you are planning to take part in a language course, you already have a knowledge of German at level B1 when applying for a visa by means of a language certificate of Language Institute recognized by us must be demonstrated. The stay for the recognition of a foreign professional qualification is generally limited to 18 months. If, in parallel with the qualification measure, a secondary employment for more than 20 hours/week is to be taken, this is only permitted if the employment is related to the professional knowledge required in the subsequent employment. Documents to be submitted: Please submit all documents in the original with one copy each, as well as in German or with German translation (pre-certified by the Iranian Foreign Ministry). Please submit the documents at your appointment sorted in the order indicated here. Biometric passport photo In colour with white background, size: 35x45mm, not older than 6 months Printing of the application form of VIDEX Including instruction ag. Article 54 AufenthG , signed by hand valid passport, signed by the passport holder, at least. 1 year valid Copy of the second and third passport pages in DIN A4 format for Afghan nationals only: Tazkira, on the basis of which the passport is issued (Paper Azkiras must be pre-certified by the Afghan Ministry of Foreign Affairs). for unit training: Preliminary consent The Foreigners Authority in Accelerated skilled labour processes or the Federal Employment Agency Proof of financing: In the case of an operational qualification measure, you must pay a minimum annual gross salary. 13,596 € (2025). To prove the financing, there are several options: Formal Undertakings Gem. §66-68 Residence Act of a person with permanent residence in Germany for the entire duration of stay OR employment contract; and ‘ Declaration on employment ‘ Deficit decision, or Notice of partial equivalence of your qualification from the certification body (the decision should contain information on which qualification measures are necessary or not). which examinations are to be taken in Germany. Evidence of planned adaptation measures: For mainly theoretical offers (in German) e.g. Language course or courses Letter of invitation/registration confirmation from the provider ‘Self-reporting’ of the provider () e.g. state-recognized / AZAV approved / Funding within the framework of state funding programs, such as e.g. the “Integration through Qualification (IQ)” funding programme, information on if applicable . Holdings involved Indication of the nature and duration of the measure with reference to the significant differences observed and information on the required minimum linguistic level For courses provided by private, non-certified or non-publicly funded providers (not for language courses, exam preparation courses): confirmation from the competent body that the action is suitable for achieving recognition For mainly operational offers () e.g. Courses, internships Forms filled in by the employer Declaration on employment ‘ and Additional sheet A on the ‘Declaration of employment’ form mandatory confirmation by the holding that the qualification can be completed on the holding Further training plan of the company, which makes it clear who is looking after you and how the goal of compensating the deficits identified in the notification should be achieved in addition, in the case of a practical activity: information on the planned remuneration For preparatory courses, mainly operational: Confirmation by the holder of the qualification action that the operational phase is part of the preparatory course. In addition, for employment during the qualification measure (§ 16d Abs.). 2 AufenthG ) Form filled in by the employer Declaration on employment ‘ and Additional sheet A Job description showing the professional connection with the future profession and information on remuneration concrete job offer for later employment as a specialist with information on remuneration In the case of qualified employment in the non-regulated profession in case of deficits in operational practice (§ 16d para.) 3 AufenthG : Decision of the body responsible for recognition, which finds that the focus is on the lack of skills, knowledge and skills in operational practice Forms filled in by the employer Declaration on employment ‘ and Additional sheet A Declaration on the employment relationship for a concrete job offer for a non-regulated profession Obligation of the employer to make it possible to compensate for the deficits found within a maximum of two years Confirmation from employer which language skills are required Proof of German language skills required for the qualification measure, min. B1 The language certificate must be based on a standardized language examination in accordance with the standards of the Association of Language Testers in Europe (ALTE). title: Visa for the recognition of the qualification of doctors (e.g. adaptation course)
title_de: Visum zur Anerkennung der Qualifikation von Ärzten ( z.B. Anpassungslehrgang)
text: Visa for the recognition of qualifications of doctors () e.g. Adaptation period Artikel Conditions: In order to work as a doctor in Germany, you must be in possession of a license or work permit. This must be the case with the competent German body are requested. The competent authority shall either establish that all the requirements for a licence or professional permit are met or that further qualification measures are required first, so-called ‘deficit notice’. Info Further information on the recognition of your foreign professional qualification can be found at Recognition in Germany . General information about working and living in Germany can be found at Make-it-in-Germany . If you already have a license or a work permit, you can directly apply for a visa to work as a professional or even a blue card. EU request. If you have received a deficit notice, you can obtain a visa to recognise your qualification in accordance with § 16d. AufenthG request. If the required language skills are not available for the issue of a professional licence in regulated professions, the qualification measures may also include participation in a language course or specialist language course. Please note that even if you are planning to take part in a language course, you already have a knowledge of German at level B1 when applying for a visa by means of a language certificate of Language Institute recognized by us must be demonstrated. The stay for the recognition of a foreign professional qualification is generally limited to 18 months. If, in parallel with the qualification measure, a secondary employment for more than 20 hours/week is to be taken, this is only permitted if the employment is related to the professional knowledge required in the subsequent employment. Documents to be submitted: Please submit all documents in the original with one copy each, as well as in German or with German translation (pre-certified by the Iranian Foreign Ministry). Please submit the documents at your appointment sorted in the order indicated here. Biometric passport photo In colour with white background, size: 35x45mm, not older than 6 months Printing of the application form of VIDEX Including instruction ag. Article 54 AufenthG , signed by hand valid passport, signed by the passport holder, at least. 1 year valid Copy of the second and third passport pages in DIN A4 format for Afghan nationals only: Tazkira, on the basis of which the passport is issued (Paper Azkiras must be pre-certified by the Afghan Ministry of Foreign Affairs). Proof of financing: If you have a school measure, such as e.g. Complete a language course, you must prove a total amount of 13,092 € per year (2025), for an operational qualification measure you must have an annual gross salary of at least. 13,596 € (2025). To prove the financing, there are several options: Formal Undertakings Gem. §66-68 Residence Act of a person with permanent residence in Germany for the entire duration of stay OR employment contract; and ‘ Declaration on employment ‘ OR Blocked account at a German financial institution with a credit balance of a total of 13,092 €/year OR Signed Blocked account statement and proof of funds in the amount of € 13,092 in the form of a bank-certified bank statement Deficit decision The recognition authority Evidence of planned adaptation measures: Contract for participation in an adaptation period in a position eligible for training; incl. Detailed training plan OR Registration at a certified language course to prepare for the technical language examination at the competent medical association, following the proven language level OR Registration for technical language examination Proof of existing knowledge of German, mind. B1 The language certificate must be based on a standardized language examination in accordance with the standards of the Association of Language Testers in Europe (ALTE). This currently applies to language certificates issued by the Goethe-Institut e.V. and telc GmbH; the Austrian Language Certificate (ÖSD); the ECL examination centre and the “TestDaF”. title: Working as a professional
text: Working as a professional Artikel Conditions: If you have a recognised education, i.e. a university degree or vocational training, and already have a job offer, you can obtain a visa to work. If you have completed your university or university degree or your vocational training in a country other than Germany, you must have this degree recognised before applying for the visa. Further information can be found under www.anerkennung-in-deutschland.de or on the portal anabine for higher education and university degrees. Please note that there are foreign university degrees that are classified as vocational training in Germany.
